title: Dutch Skillet Bean Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew made with beans and a variety of spices, perfect for a cold day. This recipe serves 4-6 people.

ingredients.name: bean
ingredients.notes: kidney beans or black beans work well

ingredients.name: sprouts
ingredients.notes: any type of sprouts (alfalfa, broccoli, etc.)

ingredients.name: intensely flavored oil
ingredients.notes: such as olive or avocado oil

ingredients.name: malty broth
ingredients.notes: vegetable or chicken broth work well

instructions: Heat the oil in the skillet over medium heat.
Add the Dutch spice mix and sauté for 1-2 minutes.
Add the bean and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the sprouts and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Pour in the broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
